title: Bird Geofencing Zone
description: A single feature in Bird's GBFS geofencing_zones FeatureCollection, describing a polygon where ride, ride-through, parking, or speed-cap rules apply.

geometry.description: GeoJSON geometry; typically a Polygon or MultiPolygon defining the zone boundary.

start.description: POSIX timestamp at which the zone becomes active.

end.description: POSIX timestamp at which the zone expires; null/absent for permanent zones.

vehicle_type_id.description: Vehicle types to which this rule applies. Omit/empty means all types.

ride_allowed.description: Whether a rider may start or be inside an active ride within the zone.

ride_through_allowed.description: Whether riders may pass through the zone without stopping.

maximum_speed_kph.description: Maximum speed cap enforced by the vehicle inside the zone.
